output.title: Security Deposit Demand Letter: Recover Your Deposit Fast | DepositBack
output.meta_description: Create a security deposit demand letter in minutes. State-specific templates to get your refund when your landlord won't return your deposit.
content_outline: The Problem: When Your Landlord Won't Return Your Security Deposit
What Is a Security Deposit Demand Letter and Why It Works
State Deadlines: How Long a Landlord Has to Return Your Deposit
How to Write a Security Deposit Letter to Your Landlord
Security Deposit Demand Letter Template vs. Automated Demand Service
Urgency & Delivery: Certified Mail, Documentation, and Legal Next Steps
FAQ: Security Deposit Refund Letters, Deductions, and Small Claims Court
key_points: Most states require landlords to return security deposits within 14 to 60 days after move-out
A formal demand letter is often a legal prerequisite before filing a small claims court case
State-specific demand letters reference local landlord-tenant statutes, increasing compliance pressure
Certified mail and photographic evidence create a defensible paper trail
DepositBack generates a legally formatted security deposit demand letter in under 10 minutes
output.cta: Get your money back now. Generate your state-specific security deposit demand letter in minutes and send it before your legal deadline expires.
output.target_audience: US renters whose landlords have failed to return a security deposit within the state-mandated timeframe and need a fast, legally credible way to demand repayment without hiring an attorney
